checkin.journal:
Last day of holidays, all relaxing things need to come to an end, time for some mental toughness this week - lets not try to cram everything in one week shall we
Stomach bug a proper one during night caused me to not sleep good and everything was just pouring out of me had to take pills
Went to practise golf ⛳️ went well was testing the Blast 💥 gadget that I got on putting area was very cool
We went to eat tacos in Lila taqueria - wow soo good
We went to Togas and other stores such as Marina, Re
